Keywords: snap stop freeze hold pause annotation card reveal
Accessibility Notes: Must be keyboard-navigable; aria-live polite on container
Code Pattern: Detect scroll progress in snap zone → scrollTo exact position → lock body overflow → setTimeout release

Keywords: parallax depth layer background slow drift
Accessibility Notes: Decorative only — no content in parallax layers
Code Pattern: transform: translateY(scrollY * rate) on background elements

Keywords: fade in reveal appear opacity enter viewport
Best For: Text reveals, card entrances, section headers
Accessibility Notes: Respect prefers-reduced-motion — show immediately if enabled
Code Pattern: IntersectionObserver with threshold 0.1 → add .visible class → opacity 0→1 + translateY

Keywords: scale up grow zoom entrance hero element
Best For: Hero elements, featured images, key stats
Accessibility Notes: Respect prefers-reduced-motion — no scale if enabled

Keywords: count up number counter stat increment animate
Accessibility Notes: Show final number immediately if prefers-reduced-motion
Code Pattern: requestAnimationFrame loop with easeOutExpo interpolation; stagger 200ms per number

Keywords: sticky pin fixed frame sequence video canvas scroll
Accessibility Notes: Canvas needs role=img + aria-label; provide text alternative
Code Pattern: position: sticky; top: 0; map scrollY to frame index

Keywords: progress bar indicator scroll position top
Accessibility Notes: Decorative — not critical for understanding content

Keywords: navbar morph pill shrink transform glass scroll
Mobile Behavior: Hide links; show logo + pill only
Accessibility Notes: Ensure nav remains keyboard-accessible after transform
Code Pattern: On scroll > threshold → max-width shrink + border-radius + backdrop-filter

Keywords: orbs floating background ambient glow blur decorative
Accessibility Notes: Purely decorative — hidden from screen readers via aria-hidden
Code Pattern: Absolute-positioned divs with blur + opacity + keyframe drift animation

Keywords: grid overlay pattern subtle texture background
Code Pattern: Repeating linear-gradient pattern with low opacity (0.02-0.05)

Keywords: stars twinkle starscape night sky ambient canvas
Accessibility Notes: Decorative — canvas aria-hidden=true; reduce or stop if prefers-reduced-motion
Code Pattern: Fixed canvas with ~180 stars; each has random drift speed + twinkle phase + opacity

Keywords: scroll hint arrow bounce indicator chevron down
Code Pattern: Bouncing chevron/arrow with translateY keyframes; hide after first scroll

Keywords: stagger cards sequence delay entrance grid
Best For: Feature grids, testimonial rows, card layouts
Accessibility Notes: Respect prefers-reduced-motion — show all at once if enabled
Code Pattern: Each card gets transition-delay: index * 200ms; trigger via IntersectionObserver

Keywords: text slide up line reveal heading entrance
Accessibility Notes: Respect prefers-reduced-motion — show immediately if enabled
Code Pattern: Split text into lines; each line translateY(30px→0) + opacity with stagger

Keywords: glow pulse accent highlight emphasis attention
Best For: Active states, counting numbers, CTA buttons
Accessibility Notes: Ensure underlying content remains readable during pulse
